name: Car Group Limited
analysis: CAR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$26.1900, stop A$25.4925, target A$29.8203 (5.20:1) — then trail it.
